nasb.text: And you shall again obey the Lord, and observe all His commandments which I command you today.

esv.text: And you shall again obey the voice of the Lord and keep all his commandments that I command you today.

cnv.text: 你卻要再聽從耶和華的話，遵行他的一切誡命，就是我今日吩咐你的。

ccb.text: 你们必再次听从耶和华，遵行今天祂借我吩咐你们的一切诫命。
